channel.title: GitHub TypeSpec Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of TypeSpec in GitHub

item.title: Azure/autorest
item.description: OpenAPI (f.k.a Swagger) Specification code generator. Supports C#, PowerShell, Go, Java, Node.js, TypeScript, Python

item.title: Azure/azure-rest-api-specs
item.description: The source for REST API specifications for Microsoft Azure.
